reference: Hello. The sudden sharp pains in the right side are more suggestive of a ureteric stone causing ureteric spasms. Please go for an ultrasound of the abdomen and urine and blood tests.
text: Hello, the sudden sharp pains in the right side are more suggestive of a ureteric stone causing ureteric spasms Please go for an ultrasound of the abdomen in urine and blood tests
